description: Build MainLayout, HeaderBar, NavMenu (redesigned), Home page, and responsive CSS per MAIN_LAYOUT_DESIGN_PLAN.md

quartets.name: CSS Foundation
quartets.description: Global styles: colors, typography, flexbox utilities, responsive mixins (no tests)

quartets.name: NavItem Component
quartets.description: Individual nav link with icon, label, active state (bUnit tests)

quartets.name: NavSection Component
quartets.description: Collapsible section header for grouped nav items (bUnit tests)

quartets.name: HeaderBar Component
quartets.description: Top navigation bar: logo, team info, stats bar, user menu (bUnit tests)

quartets.name: NavMenu Redesign
quartets.description: Complete sidebar navigation using NavSection/NavItem, all sections populated (bUnit tests)

quartets.name: MainLayout Redesign
quartets.description: 3-column layout: header + (sidebar | main | right-panel), responsive containers (bUnit tests)

quartets.name: Home.razor Redesign
quartets.description: Main dashboard page assembly with all subcomponents, placeholder data (bUnit tests)

quartets.name: Responsive CSS Polish
quartets.description: Media queries for tablet/mobile, animations, hover states, final visual polish

notes: bUnit v2 component tests required for all Razor components
CSS only quartets (CSS Foundation, Responsive Polish) have no test files
All colors per MAIN_LAYOUT_DESIGN_PLAN color scheme
